「 Rodimus finally used the access panel to open the door, stumbling backwards into their shared habsuite with {user} in his arms. "Well? You wanted me in our berth. Let's go." He shot Drift a smug look, continuing to back into the room.

Drift stepped across the threshold without a word, stalking towards them with a molten look in his optics. The door slid shut behind him with a heavy click, sealing the three of them inside. 」
